title: Powell holds US interest rates steady in what is likely his final decision as Fed chairman
description: His time leading the Federal Reserve ends on 15 May and was marked by frequent attacks from President Trump, who wanted lower interest rates.
content:
'High levels of uncertainty' in economy over Middle East conflict - Powell

title: Mohamed Salah: Liverpool forward expected to return before end of season after sustaining 'minor' muscle injury
description: Mo Salah announced last month that he and the club had agreed to bring his nine-year stay at Liverpool to a close at the end of the season; Egypt international Salah picked up an injury during Liverpools 3-1 win over Crystal Palace
content:
Mohamed Salah is expected to return for Liverpool before the end of the season after suffering a "minor" muscle injury, the club has confirmed.
The 33-year-old went down, clutching his leg, during Liverpool's 3-1 win over Crystal Palace on Saturday a... [2538 chars]

title: Motorola unveils the 2026 Razr 70, Razr 70 Plus, and Razr 70 Ultra
description: They will be sold under different names in North America and the rest of the world. Right on time and as promised, today Motorola has announced the new,...
content: Right on time and as promised, today Motorola has announced the new, 2026 versions of the Razr, Razr+, and Razr Ultra for the North American market. These will be known internationally as the Razr 70, Razr 70 Plus, and Razr 70 Ultra, respectively. Le... [3723 chars]

title: Putin, Trump Discuss Iran, Ukraine in Phone Call, Kremlin Aide Says
description: Russian President Vladimir Putin spoke by phone with US counterpart Donald Trump, Kremlin aide Yuri Ushakov said Wednesday, adding the two leaders discussed the Middle East war and Ukraine.
content:
He added Russia was "firmly committed to providing every possible assistance to diplomatic efforts" on the Middle East war, and said the call was held at Moscow's initiative.

title: UK to create alliance of ‘northern navies’ to counter Russian threat
description: The head of the Royal Navy has set out plans for a multinational force commanded from London ‘that trains, exercises and prepares together’
content:
Britain and its allies will forge a new partnership of “northern navies” comprising ships and drones ready to take on Russia, the first sea lord has announced.
